empty_desc: Sura iduka ry'ubucuruzi kugira ngo wongere ibicuruzwa mu gikapu cyawe.
title: Igikapu Cyanjye
insufficient_balance: Amafaranga ari kuri JamiiWallet yawe ntahagije kwishyura iyi oda.
payment_note: Kwishyura ibicuruzwa n'ibikorwa bikorwa gusa binyuze muri JamiiWallet - amafaranga azakurwaho ako kanya igihe wohereje oda.
order_placed: Oda yawe yishyuwe kandi yoherejwe neza!
dropoff_address_placeholder: urugero: Umuhanda wa Uhuru, hafi y'Isoko Rikuru
dropoff_location_pending: Dukeneye uruhushya rwo kumenya aho uri kugira ngo dubare amafaranga y'ubwoherezi.
no_quotes: Injiza aderesi kugira ngo urebe uburyo bwo kohererezwa.
payment_note_delivery: Amafaranga y'igicuruzwa n'ubwoherezi azabikwa (escrow) kugeza ubwoherezi bwemejwe na wewe n'umushoferi - ni bwo amafaranga azahabwa umucuruzi n'umushoferi.
order_held: Oda yakiriwe - amafaranga abitswe kugeza ubwoherezi burangiye!
order_confirmed_desc_delivery: Amafaranga abitswe - azahabwa umucuruzi n'umushoferi ubwoherezi bumaze kurangira kandi ukemeje ko wabonye.
delivery_details_required: Hitamo aho ubwoherezi buzajya n'ubwoko bw'ikinyabiziga.
multi_seller_note: Ibicuruzwa byawe bizoherezwa nk'oda zitandukanye ku mucuruzi umwe umwe.
identity_verification_required: Ugomba kwemeza umwirondoro wawe mbere yo kugura.
credit_pickup_only: Inguzanyo iraboneka gusa igihe uzajya kwitorera ibintu (PICKUP) kuri ubu.
cash_payment_note: Amafaranga ntabwo abikwa kuri interineti - ishyura amafaranga y'ikiganza igihe uzajya gutwara ibintu. Nta bwishingizi bwa escrow muri ubu buryo.
cash_credit_conflict: Kwishyura amafaranga y'ikiganza ntibishobora guhuzwa n'amabwiriza y'inguzanyo.
order_placed_cash: Icyifuzo cyawe cyemejwe - ishyura amafaranga y'ikiganza igihe uzajya kucyakira!
order_confirmed_desc_cash: Ishyura amafaranga y'ikiganza igihe uzajya gutwara ibintu mu iduka - ucuruzi azemeza amafaranga amaze kwakirwa.
payment_note_mixed_cash: Ibintu bimwe bizishyurwa amafaranga y'ikiganza igihe utwaye - ibisigaye bizakurwa kuri JamiiWallet yawe ubu.
